rules.statement: Every subject namespace with rows in awaiting_reaudit MUST have a registered drainer in .intent/enforcement/quarantine/drainer_registry.yaml. Absence is not a valid signal — ADR-045's drain-to-zero promise holds only for namespaces with a registered drainer.
rules.rationale: ADR-072. Without a registered drainer, findings entering awaiting_reaudit cannot exit. 19 test.missing/test.failure rows accumulated over 9 days (2026-05-16 → 2026-05-25) before the gap was diagnosed; only AuditViolationSensor was wired. The audit pipeline cannot detect this class of leak — the rule is mapped (so ADR-066 does not fire), ADR-038's circuit-breaker does not fire (no proposals are created), and BlackboardShopManager's stale-alert is a symptom-side signal, not a cause-side one. This rule is the cause-side guard.
